debug_info.goal:
S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions
t : Time
hx :
  ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC ≠ 0 ∨
    ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC ≠ 0
⊢ Time.deriv (ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.sol S IC) t = 0 ↔
    ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.sol S IC t =
      √(‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC‖ ^ 2 +
            (‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) •
        Space.basis 0

proof:
rw [sol_eq, sol_velocity]
  simp
  constructor
  · intro h
    have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
    have := tan_time_eq_of_sol_velocity_eq_zero S IC t h hx
    rw [tan_eq_sin_div_cos] at this
    field_simp at this
    rw [← this]
    simp [norm_smul, Real.sqrt_div, mul_pow, ← pow_two]
    congr
    field_simp [hω]
    ring
  · intro h
    simp [norm_smul, Real.sqrt_div, mul_pow, ← pow_two] at h
    have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
    field_simp [hω] at h
    simp [h]
    ring

S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : InitialConditions
t : Time
hx : IC.x₀ ≠ 0 ∨ IC.v₀ ≠ 0
⊢ ∂ₜ (fun t => cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀ + (sin (S.ω * t.val) / S.ω) • IC.v₀) t = 0 ↔
    (fun t => cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀ + (sin (S.ω * t.val) / S.ω) • IC.v₀) t =
      √(‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) • Space.basis 0
